name: All 9 Amino by Dymatize
description_html:
The importance of branched chain amino acids can’t be stated enough. This important nutrient is required in order to produce maximum energy output in every single workout you do as well as to help harness your own natural recovery reserves to ensure you build muscle as quickly as possible.

Many people do a great job of picking up a protein powder to use after their workout session but completely overlook the fact that during exercise, your muscles have specific needs as well.

Branched chain amino acids provide that and All 9 Amino by Dymatize ensures that you never miss a beat.

With this product, you’ll:
  • See accelerated rates of recovery in the gym – no more downtime spent trying to heal up those muscle tissues. You’ll be ready to go so you can carry on with your training session tomorrow
  • Improve your energy levels during the gym. While most people think of amino acids as just the building blocks to muscle tissue (and they are), what’s unique about branched chain amino acids is that they can actually also provide muscular fuel, so can help you perform more work during your exercise session
  • Improve your ability to handle fatigue. More energy means greater fatigue resistant
  • Improve your natural hydration levels, which can help enhance endurance and muscle strength
  • Get a caffeine free formula, meaning this product is great to use on its own or can easily be stacked with another product if desired

All 9 Amino by Dymatize is a complete branched chain amino acid blend that will give you everything that you’re looking for in a intra-workout supplement. Simply mix this with a large bottle of water and then sip during your workout session. You’ll see noticeable improvements in your performance as well as how you feel when you’re outside of the gym as well.

With each scoop that you take in of All 9 Amino by Dymatize, you’ll get:
  • 20 mg of Niacin to help you stay focused and dialed in
  • 10 mg of vitamin B6 and Vitamin B12 to help increase natural energy levels in the body without any stimulatory effects
  • 7.2 grams of L-Leucine, L-Isoleucine, and L-Valine to give you the critical amino acids needed for maximum recovery
  • 2.8 grams of essential amino acids so that you can rest assured you’re not falling short in your diet plan.
  • 200 mg of coconut water to help enhance hydration during your workout session and provide key electrolytes to the body

Don’t leave home without All 9 Amino by Dymatize. It is a product that will transform your workout.

name: BCAA Complex 2200 by Dymatize
description_html:
Dymatize Nutrition bring you this comprehensive branched chain amino acid (BCAA) complex for your athletic performance needs.

Providing 2,200mg of BCAAs per serve, the essential BCAAs leucine, isoleucine and valine are of special importance for athletes.

Second only to protein powders, BCAAs are used by more professional strength coaches around the world than any other supplement.

Some of the key benefits

  • 2200mg of pure free form (BCAAs) per serve
  • Assists in muscle recovery
  • Assists in muscle growth

name: BCAA Powder by Dymatize
description_html:
This branched chain amino acid (BCAA) complex from Dymatize provides the necessary muscle building support and anabolic environment you need to progress to muscle and strength gains beyond the average.

BCAAs have been thoroughly researched for their potential muscle protective and muscle growth properties. Studies have linked BCAAs to roles in effective muscle growth, muscle energy and repair.

The BCAAs got their name because of their unique branched chemical structure. All BCAAs are essential amino acids and as such the body cannot make them from other compounds, they must be consumed in the diet. It is a well-known fact that amino acids are responsible for protein synthesis, hence the moniker they go by - "the building blocks."

This is a maximum strength formula designed to provide a 5050 mg complex of the pure free form amino acids L-valine, L-leuceine and L-isoleucine in every serving. These three protein-sparing amino acids are known as the branched chain.

This product is available at Nutrition Warehouse in a 300g size.

description_html:
This is a 100 percent pure pharmaceutical grade creatine monohydrate from the Dymatize crew that's designed for improving athletic performance during high-intensity physical activity such as weight training, HITT, crossfit, running or any other aerobic/anaerobic session.

Creatine has become a staple member of any athlete or gym trainee’s supplement family and with good reason. It’s one of the most studied human performance support products on planet earth.

This creatine monohydrate is manufactured using only the most advanced techniques and conforms to the strict internationally recognised molecular composition.

With some of the highest quality, purest creatine available, giving you the ultimate in muscle energy production.

This creatine product has been processed to an ultra-fine 180 microns, ensuring proper dispersion for your consumption.

This product is available at Nutrition Warehouse in a 500g size.

With added Creatine for strength and endurance, Glutamine for recovery, and essential vitamins and minerals for complete nutrition, Super Mass Gainer is a powerful all-in-one solution for hard gainers and athletes looking to crush plateaus.

Highlights of Dymatize Super Mass Gainer™

name: Dymatize Super Mass Gainer
description_html: Super Mass Gainer fuels your body with 52g of fast and slow absorbing high-quality protein and at least 245g of carbohydrates for massive gains, plus 14 vitamins and minerals you need for big results. Gain mass. Gain confidence. Gain it all.

name: Elite 100% Whey by Dymatize
description_html:
Formulated for easy mixing, delicious flavour and optimal performance, Dymatize 100% Elite Whey is made to be maximally anabolic while remaining banned substance free.

  • Zero Gluten
  • High BCAA’s
  • Informed Choice Trusted

Whether you are preparing for a hard workout, are looking to recover optimally or simply need more protein in your diet, Elite 100% Whey combines a multi-phase release protein blend with delicious flavours for the ultimate protein blend.

Utilising a high protein, very high amino acid yielding protein blend, allows the user to maximise muscle growth without having to max out on calories.

This makes Dymatize Elite Whey both the perfect protein for someone looking to gain lean muscle but also someone who needs less protein per serve but still wants the maximal effect.

Core Ingredients

Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC)

WPC is created through the cheese making process and yields a high amino acid profile with close to 80% protein per 100g of powder. It also contains gut health promoting bacteria, insulin growth-like factors for muscle growth and has a low lactose content per serve while still maintaining a creamier texture and a steady state release of amino acids into the blood stream.

Whey Protein Isolate (WPI)

WPI is a 2nd phase production product, whereby they filter out a higher level of fats from the WPC and also reduce the lactose content to marginal levels. Consequently, this filtration process increases the protein content to upwards of 90% per 100g of powder and yields an extremely high amino acid content for maximal muscle protein synthesis.

Hydrolysed Whey Protein Concentrate (HWPC)

HWPC is a 3rd phase production product, whereby the amino acid bonds of a WPC are cleaved and broken down into di and tri-peptides, meaning 2 and 3 amino acids joined together, which allows the amino acids to enter the bloodstream with ease due to their pre-digestion.

Final Thoughts

Utilising only the best technique of cross-flow microfiltration for their whey protein production, Dymatize Elite protein provides nearly 12g of Essential Amino Acids per serving with a maximally dosed 2.7g of Leucine per serving for optimal muscle recovery.

name: Elite Casein by Dymatize
description_html:
Sustained-Absorbing 100% Micellar Casein

Casein is a unique protein derived from milk that breaks down more slowly in the digestive system which increases satiety and provides a slower release of muscle-building amino acids. So if your goal is to build muscle or avoid muscle protein breakdown in between meals or during sleep, Elite Casein is an excellent protein choice.

Elite Casein uses a cross-flow microfiltration processing to help preserve the natural state of casein protein’s important muscle building properties.

Elite Casein is formulated by in-house research and development scientists by carefully selecting ingredients that meet strict quality standards and specifications

This is not your stock standard protein bar!

Available in multiple flavours, you can now enjoy an Elite protein bar anytime anywhere!

description_html:
Elite Whey is de perfecte mix uit Whey proteïne Isolaten, Whey peptides en Whey concentraten.

Versterkt met ZYTRIX enzym mix en verkrijgbaar in verschillende overheerlijke smaken. Elite Whey is aspartaam vrij en instant, het lost dus perfect op in elke vloeistof! Je krijgt alleen dat wat je echt wilt, 100% pure en schone eiwitten die bijdragen tot de instandhouding en groei van spiermassa.

name: Glutamine Micronized by Dymatize
description_html:
L-glutamine is the most prevalent amino found in muscle and it’s a protective agent against muscle degradation. Put simply, it is now a staple item in many supplement regimes and this glutamine product from Dymatize is a useful addition for any athlete or everyday gym trainee.

In addition to the direct muscular benefits often reported with this supplement, L-glutamine is also linked with nervous system supporting qualities that make it a versatile and valuable component in your diet.

This product is available at Nutrition Warehouse in a 500g serve size.

name: ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear by Dymatize
description_html:
Try a new protein that is simple, clear, crisp and refreshing. Dymatize has crafted a protein powder that is high-quality and has zero sugar and carbohydrates. ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear will support your fitness goals.

This product has high-quality ingredients delivering you a premium protein powder for any time of the day. The combination of hydrolysed whey protein isolate and whey protein isolate has a whopping 20g of protein per serve.

ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear has a fruity and well-crafted flavour that contains no artificial colours or flavours, and it’s sweetened with stevia. This protein powder is convenient and tastes delicious so you can sip on and enjoy throughout the day.

When you have ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear by Dymatize, you will:
  • Support body composition goals. When you combine this product with the right diet and exercise plan to suit your goals, you will see better results.
  • Support energy requirements. You will provide the body with the nutrients needed for optimal performance in and out of the gym.
  • Support recovery with 4g of BCAAs, which will support muscle soreness and fatigue.
  • Support better digestion with the combination of hydrolysed whey protein isolate and whey protein isolate, which is a form of protein that is easily digested and absorbed by the body.
  • Consume a product that has been tested for banned substances, and it’s gluten-free.
  • Have a great tasting product, which has been made with premium quality ingredients.

When it comes to achieving your fitness and health goals, look no further than ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear by Dymatize. You will have a mouth-watering product that is packed with protein and no sugar, carbs and fat.

Each serve (1 scoop/25g) of ISO 100 Hydrolyzed Clear by Dymatize has:
  • 90 calories
  • 20g of protein
  • 18g of total amino acids
  • Zero carbs, sugars and fat
  • No artificial colours or flavours

Warning: Contains milk. This product is not a sole source of nutrition and should be consumed in conjunction with a nutritious diet and an appropriate training or exercise program. Not suitable for children under 15 years of age or pregnant women: Should only be used under medical or dietetic supervision.

Dymatize ISO 100 is made solely from WPI, which is the most refined version of whey protein, offering a naturally high level of amino acids. It is low in both carbohydrates and fats to enhance absorption speed, ISO 100 also contains HWPI, which offers pre-digested di and tri-peptide amino acid bonds for faster recovery and muscle repair.

Why choose ISO100 by Dymatize?

Reach your goals faster with clean, effective protein support—Dymatize ISO100, available now at Nutrition Warehouse.

name: Iso-100 Hydrolyzed
description_html:

name: Liquid L-Carnitine 1100 by Dymatize
description_html:
This liquid L-carnitine product from Dymatize delivers on the amino known for supporting muscle growth and development, assisting with fat burning, improving energy levels and fighting fatigue. In addition, if you’re on a strict diet regime it may also help curb cravings and assist with appetite.

As a sports and exercise supplement, L-carnitine has been linked with assisting athletic performance and endurance. By assisting with the burning of fat for energy, muscle glycogen is not depleted in the otherwise muscle degrading levels it would be. Coupled with fighting lactic acid build-up and fatigue, muscular endurance is increased and consequently the positive benefits flow through.

Additionally, l-carnitine has been reported as an important metabolic player, helping to transport fats to be burned away as energy.

This convenient and great tasting product is available at Nutrition Warehouse in a 31 serve size in Lemonade and Blue Raspberry flavours.

name: NW x Dymatize Shaker by Dymatize
Pre W.O. by Dymatize
description_html:
Never waste another workout!

Dymatize have created a perfectly engineered pre-workout with an unrivalled performance profile!

  • Pure Energy
  • Enhanced Performance
  • Increased Strength

Designed and engineered to enhance anaerobic performance through strength and power optimisation, Dymatize Pre W.O provides maximally dosed and clinically researched ingredients for maximum benefit.

With an entire months supply per tub, you won't be wasting another workout ever again!

If you want to achieve a peak physique you need to achieve peak performance and Dymatize Pre W.O is the product you need to do this. In a world of pre workouts where small ‘potent’ scoops have ruled the market, Dymatize has brought out perhaps one of the most efficaciously dosed pre workouts on the market and just 1 scoop should truly improve performance without question.

One serving of Pre W.O. by Dymatize contains:
  • 8g Citrulline Malate
  • 3.2g Beta Alanine
  • 1.5g Betaine
  • 1.5g Nitrosigine
  • 350mg N-Acetyl-L-Tyrosine
  • 300mg Caffeine
  • 125mg Theacrine
  • 200mg Coconut Fruit Powder

name: Super Mass Gainer
description_html:
Supermass Gainer van Dymatize bevat een mix van koolhydraten en eiwitten en ook diverse extra ingrediënten als Creatine, BCAA's en Vitamines en Mineralen. Super Mass Gainer van Dymatize kun je nemen op meerdere momenten:

Je kunt de shakes overdag tussen de maaltijden nemen en zo op een kwalitatief goede manier de calorie-inname omhoog brengen waardoor je kilo's kunt aanzetten. Je kunt daarnaast na de training een shake nemen. De eiwitten in Super Mass Gainer ondersteunen snel herstel van de spieren na training.

Naast de koolhydraten voor energie bevat Super Mass Gainer 4 soorten eiwitten

Whey Protein Isolate, Whey Protein concentrate, Caseinate en Egg Proteine. Eiwitten dragen bij tot de instandhouding van spiermassa, zijn gunstig voor het herstel na training en stimuleren de spiergroei. Verder is Zytrix technology toegevoegd om te zorgen voor een nog betere opname van de voedingsstoffen, het gaat er namelijk niet om hoeveel calorieën je inneemt, maar ook om hoeveel het lichaam kan opnemen.

Uitleg ingredienten Super Mass Gainer:

Glutamine→ Glutamine is één van de 20 aminozuren. Glutamine kan door het lichaam zelf worden aangemaakt maar soms kan het lichaam hierin ondersteuning gebruiken. Supplementen bieden dan een uitkomst. BCAA's→ (Branched Chain Amino Acids: Leucine, Isoleucine, Valine); deze aminozuren behoren tot de essentiele aminozuren, wat betekent dat wij ze tot ons moeten nemen via de voeding of voedingssupplementatie. Vitaminen-Mineralen→ zijn verantwoordelijk voor talloze reacties in het lichaam. Dymatize Protein Blend * Whey Proteine Isolate→ De zuiverste en de juiste vorm van eiwitten. Whey Protein Concentrate→ Dit is een bijna ideale eiwit vorm. Whey Protein Concentrate wordt optimaal door het lichaam gebruikt, wordt gemakkelijk verteerd en is bijna lactose- en vetvrij. Whey Protein Concentrate wordt heel intensief gefilterd. Egg Protein→ Bestaat uit meer dan 80% zuiver eiwit van zeer goede kwaliteit. Calcium Caseinate→ Calcium Caseinaat wordt gelijkmatig opgenomen door het lichaam. Calcium helpt de normale spierwerking behouden. Ook ondersteunt calcium het behoud van een gezonde spijsvertering.

name: Super Mass Gainer Bar
description_html:
Heerlijke reep met veel calorieën en veel eiwitten

Geen tijd of zin om een shake te maken? Super Mass Gainer van Dymatize is er nu ook in een handige reep. De Super Massa Gainer reep weegt maar liefst 90 gram en bevat 27 gram eiwit.

name: Super Mass Gainer by Dymatize
description_html:
Fuel your gains with a high-quality protein packed with slow and fast-absorbing protein – Super Mass Gainer by Dymatize is packed with all the nutrients your body needs to reap the rewards from your training. Each serving contains 52g of fast and slow protein and at least 245g of carbohydrates for huge gains.

Enhanced with 14 vitamins and minerals plus creatine, Super Mass Gainers delivers all the nutrients to fuel your gains. If you are serious about putting on some quality size, adding a premium mass gainer is necessary. This mass gainer powerhouse is banned substance tested and comes in delicious indulgent flavours. Plus, you can also use Dymatize Super Mass Gainer for baking as it blends easily.

What are the benefits of Super Mass Gainer Dymatize?

  • High-quality protein
  • Fast and slow-absorbing protein
  • Blends easily and is great for baking
  • Vitamins and minerals to support health
  • Banned substance tested
  • 52g of protein and 1310 calories per serving
  • 253g of carbohydrates and packed with 14 vitamins and minerals

What’s the protein blend used in the Super Mass Gainer by Dymatize?

The protein blend in Dymatize Super Mass Gainer is whey protein concentrate, milk protein isolate, whey protein isolate, whey protein hydrolysate, and micellar casein. This blend will provide the body with fast and slow-digesting protein for maximal gains.

Can I mix creatine to Dymatize Super Mass Gainer?

Dymatize Super Mass Gainer contains 1g of creatine monohydrate, if you want to add more than that, you can mix creatine with mass gainer to support your fitness goals. One of the best mass gainers in Australia, Super Mass Gainer delivers all the nutrients needed for ultima gain in and out of the gym.

name: Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize
description_html:
As you train hard in the gym, it’s essential that you are doing everything you can to support optimal muscle growth. Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize is going to be there for you every step of the way, helping the natural rebuilding process as it takes place.

What’s unique about Super Amino 6000 is that it provides not only branched chain amino acids, but glutamine and arginine as well for even greater support.

When you use Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize, you’re going to notice:
  • Improved energy levels. When you usually would feel like you want to quit, you’ll be able to push through and get that extra work done.
  • Improved nitrogen retention, especially while dieting meaning you’ll be at a reduced risk for lean muscle mass loss.
  • Faster recovery between workout sessions. Bounce back quicker so that you have less downtime recovering. This means more time making great progress.
  • Both fast and slow releasing amino acids to help turn off catabolic processes while turning on anabolic ones.
  • Improved strength output while in the gym so you can lift more weight and see faster progress.
  • Better focus and concentration so you can get all the necessary work done while you’re in the gym.
  • Improved immune system strength thanks to the addition of glutamine, which will keep you feeling stronger day-by-day.

Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize is going to supply you with everything you aren’t going to get from your usual protein supplement. While using protein powder is advantageous, it’s often not enough to help you see remarkable results.

Combine the two together, and now you’re ready for battle.

In every serving of Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize, you’re going to get:
  • 575 mg of Leucine to help promote optimal muscle repair and recovery
  • 313 mg of Isoleucine to help transform your muscle growth and catapult your recovery
  • 313 mg of Valine, which will help to boost your muscle energy and reduce catabolic processes in the body
  • 1 mg of glutamine to help keep your immune system strong and ready to keep you feeling your best
  • 339 mg of arginine, which will help improve your muscle endurance and help fend off fatigue during exercise

Performance, Recovery, Growth. That is what you’ll see with Super Protein Amino 6000 by Dymatize.

name: Z Force by Dymatize
description_html:
Support health, hormone function, immunity and systemic cellular function with the most commonly deficient minerals experienced in developed countries. Combining Zinc, Magnesium, B6 and additional antioxidants in Vitamin E and Vitamin C, Dymatize Z-Force is your one-stop antioxidant and mineral product for optimal health.

Used in greater than 300 cellular functions, magnesium is classified as an essential mineral with critical importance for a multitude of actions within the body.

Reducing magnesium deficiency may improve gastrointestinal health, muscle function, blood glucose regulation, nervous system output and insulin sensitivity. Often likened to providing a calming effect post consumption, magnesium can be used multiple times per day.

Similarly, Zinc is a natural mineral used in many bodily functions including the creation of male testosterone while also supporting a strong immune system.

Supplementing with Zinc may improve immune strength, reduce the risk of sickness and may even improve stress-related skin issues such as eczema and dermatitis.

Consume 1 serving daily for optimal results.
